prompt: Run the agentic NPU workflow for M=1537, N=257, K=769 with bf16. I want to see the analysis of which strategy was best and why.
assertions: All three strategies are queried and their estimated total_us values are compared
The winning strategy is named and its advantage explained
The padded dims satisfy Mp >= 1537, Np >= 257, Kp >= 769
The final padded shape (Mp, Np, Kp) are each from their respective ALLOWED lists
Phase 3 analysis mentions actual vs estimated latency comparison
Phase 4 appends a run record or explains it could not write
